citations.desc: Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC).
citations.narrative:
IACUC approved protocol #DB-838 did not provide a complete description of the proposed use of the animals. There was
an incomplete description of the survival re-implantation procedure; there was no description of the local anesthetic nerve
block that is used during the operative procedures; and the IACUC approved protocol includes a description of a
procedure that is not conducted in DB #838 (acute re-implantation procedure).
Per this Section, proposals to conduct an activity involving animals must contain a complete description of the proposed
use of the animals so the IACUC can determine during its review that all components of the animal use proposal are in
accordance with the requirements as outlined in this subchapter of the AWA. The IACUC needs to address this item.
Correct by 3/9/26.
This inspection and exit briefing were conducted with facility representatives.
*END OF REPORT*
n

narrative:
2.31(e)(3) 
   
Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC). 
IACUC approved protocol #DB-838 did not provide a complete description of the proposed use of the animals. There was 
an incomplete description of the survival re-implantation procedure; there was no description of the local anesthetic nerve 
block that is used during the operative procedures; and the IACUC approved protocol includes a description of a 
procedure that is not conducted in DB #838 (acute re-implantation procedure). 
 
Per this Section, proposals to conduct an activity involving animals must contain a complete description of the proposed 
use of the animals so the IACUC can determine during its review that all components of the animal use proposal are in 
accordance with the requirements as outlined in this subchapter of the AWA. The IACUC needs to address this item. 
Correct by 3/9/26. 
 
This inspection and exit briefing were conducted with facility representatives.  
 
*END OF REPORT*
